svg.title: PerformX architecture diagram
svg.desc: Three-tier architecture showing browser, API, and data layers with background jobs

g.text: React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS · hosted on Vercel

svg.text: Middleware: JWT auth · role-based access control · window guard · score engine

g.text: Vercel Cron · runs daily at 9 AM UTC

svg.text: Vercel (frontend) · Render (backend) · Supabase (DB) · Total cost: $0 / month
